英文原文: Press and hold [B] to toggle boosters. They will help you perform an immediate stop. You can also toggle them from the systems menu. This way, whenever you release your throttle input, the boosters will engage and help stop your ship. Boosters must be built separately for each hulk node via their info window.

DeepSeek参考: 按住[B]来切换助推器。它们能帮助你立刻停船。你也可以在系统菜单中切换它们。这样一来，每当你松开油门，助推器就会启动并协助你的飞船制动。助推器必须通过每个残骸节点的信息窗口单独建造。

英文原文:
Welcome to the bulletin board for Starminer!

Here you can stay up to date with recent news and announcements.

We've also added a change log with a record of all the recent updates and changes we've made to the game. By keeping an eye on the change log, you can stay up to date with all the new features, bugfixes, and new keyboard shortcuts.

Whether you're a new player or a seasoned veteran, this is a great way to ensure that you're getting the most out of your experience.

As always, don't hesitate to tell us your feedback – join our discord or write to us directly: info@coolandgoodgames.com

Thanks for playing our game and good luck out there on the brink!

欢迎来到星矿公告板！

在这里您可以了解最新的新闻和公告。

我们还添加了更新日志，记录了游戏的所有最新更新和改动。通过关注更新日志，您可以及时了解所有新功能、错误修复和新的键盘快捷键。

无论您是新手玩家还是资深老将，这都是确保您充分体验游戏的绝佳方式。

一如既往，请随时告诉我们您的反馈 - 加入我们的Discord或直接写信给我们：info@coolandgoodgames.com

感谢您游玩我们的游戏，祝您在边缘地带好运！

英文原文:
Detach: Separate this node from its current connection and create a new station.

By using the detach function, you can disconnect this node from its current connection and transform it into a standalone entity. This allows you to create a new station using the detached node as its foundation.

Upon detaching, the node becomes an independent module, enabling you to explore new possibilities in station design and expand your operations. You can utilize the detached node to build a separate facility, optimize resource allocation, or implement specialized functions.

Note that detaching a node will sever its existing connections and any dependent systems may need to be reconfigured. Exercise caution and plan accordingly to ensure a smooth transition during the detachment process.
AI翻译:
分离：将此节点从当前连接中分离，创建一个新空间站。

使用分离功能，您可以断开此节点与当前的连接，并将其转化为独立实体。这允许您使用分离的节点作为基础创建新空间站。

分离后，该节点将成为独立模块，使您能够探索空间站设计的新可能性并扩展您的业务。您可以利用分离的节点建造独立设施、优化资源分配或实施专门功能。

请注意，分离节点将切断其现有连接，任何依赖系统可能需要重新配置。请谨慎操作并做好相应规划，以确保分离过程顺利进行。

分离后，该节点将成为独立模块，让你能够在空间站设计中探索新的可能性，扩展你的行动范围。你可以利用分离出的节点建造独立设施、优化资源分配或实现专业化功能。

请注意，分离节点将切断其现有连接，任何依赖系统都可能需要重新配置。谨慎操作并提前规划，确保分离过程平稳过渡。

英文原文:
Disassemble: Convert this structure into its base resources or store it in the General Storage module if available.

If you have a General Storage module built and enough space in it, disassembling this structure will allow you to store it for future use. Alternatively, if there isn't enough space in the General Storage, the structure will be converted into the base resources that were originally used to build it.

Please note that disassembling a structure is irreversible, and any specialized upgrades or modifications will be lost. Make sure to plan ahead and consider your storage capacity before disassembling.

英文原文:
Package Collection Focus: Instruct the engineers in the hangar to prioritize only picking up packages.

By clicking the Package Collection Focus button, you can direct the engineers in the hangar to exclusively focus on collecting packages. When this filter is active, the engineers will ignore other types of resources and tasks, dedicating their efforts to retrieving and handling packages specifically.

Enabling this specialized focus ensures efficient package management and timely delivery within your station's operations. The engineers will diligently locate and retrieve packages, facilitating smooth logistics and optimizing the distribution of important items or goods throughout the station.

Note that with the Package Collection Focus activated, engineers will no longer prioritize the collection of other resource types or engage in different tasks. Ensure alternative means are in place to manage other resource types effectively, if required.
AI翻译:
包裹收集专注：指示机库中的工程师仅优先拾取包裹。

点击包裹收集专注按钮，您可以指示机库中的工程师专注于收集包裹。当此过滤器激活时，工程师将忽略其他类型的资源和任务，专门致力于检索和处理包裹。

启用此专门模式可确保高效的包裹管理和空间站运营中的及时交付。工程师将努力定位和检索包裹，促进顺畅的物流并优化重要物品或货物在整个空间站的分发。

请注意，启用包裹收集专注后，工程师将不再优先收集其他资源类型或从事不同的任务。如有需要，请确保有替代方式来有效管理其他资源类型。

启用此专项聚焦可确保空间站运营中包裹的高效管理和及时送达。工程师将勤勉地定位和取回包裹，促进顺畅物流，并优化重要物品或货物在整个空间站的分发。

英文原文:
Package Processing: Instruct the refinery to process stored packages delivered by engineers and stored in the General Storage module.

By clicking the Package Processing function, you can direct the refinery to process the stored packages that have been delivered by the engineers and stored in the General Storage. The refinery will extract valuable materials, refine components, or perform any necessary processing to transform the packages into usable resources.

Utilizing the Package Processing feature enables efficient utilization of the packages collected by the engineers, extracting valuable materials and enhancing your station's resource pool. This allows for further manufacturing, construction, or trading opportunities, depending on the nature of the processed packages.

Make the most of the Package Processing function to unlock the full potential of the resources contained within the packages and drive your station's productivity and growth.
AI翻译:

使用包裹处理功能可以高效利用工程师收集的包裹，提取宝贵材料并增强您空间站的资源储备。这允许进一步的制造、建造或贸易机会，具体取决于处理后包裹的性质。

充分利用包裹处理功能，释放包裹中包含资源的全部潜力，推动空间站的生产力和发展。

英文原文:
Resource Collection Focus: Instruct the engineers in the hangar to prioritize picking up scattered resources and mined asteroid chunks.

By clicking the Resource Collection Focus button, you can direct the engineers in the hangar to exclusively focus on collecting scattered resources and mined asteroid chunks. With this filter active, the engineers will disregard trade routes and concentrate their efforts on gathering valuable resources throughout the station's vicinity.

Enabling this specialized focus allows for efficient resource management and maximizes the utilization of available raw materials. The engineers will diligently scan the area for scattered resources and mine asteroid chunks, ensuring a steady supply of materials for further processing and production.

Keep in mind that with Resource Collection Focus activated, the engineers will no longer prioritize trade routes or other tasks. If trade routes are crucial for your station's operations, ensure that alternative means are in place to manage them effectively.

Resource Processing: Instruct the refinery to convert stored resources into processed ore.

By clicking specific filter buttons (Iron, Silicates, Cobalt, Thorium), you can instruct the refinery to process the stored resources of the corresponding type. The Resource Processing function allows for the efficient utilization of raw materials and enhances the production capabilities of your station. Take advantage of the Resource Processing function to maximize your station's potential and optimize resource allocation for manufacturing, construction, or trading endeavors.

英文原文:
Receive Energy: Enable remote charging to receive energy from another node within range.

By clicking the Receive Energy button, you can register this node to receive energy through remote charging from another node within a range of up to 100 meters. This enables you to establish an energy transfer connection between nodes located in different stations.

Ensure that the corresponding Send Energy function is enabled on the source node, located on a separate station, to initiate the remote charging process. Once the connection is established and both nodes are within range, energy will be transferred to power the receiving node.

Utilize the Receive Energy option to efficiently distribute and share energy resources across multiple stations, optimizing your power management and enabling seamless operation of interconnected nodes.
原版中文（官方zh）:
接收能源：启用远程充能，从范围内的另一个节点接收能源。

点击“接收能源”按钮，就可以登记该节点，通过远程充能的方式从另一个节点接收能源，上述两个节点之间的距离上限为 100 米。你可以用这种方法在位于不同站点的节点之间建立能源传输连接。

不要忘记在位于另一个站点的能源来源节点上启用相应的“输送能源”功能，才能启动远程充能进程。若能成功建立连接，并且两个节点都在距离限制之内，就可以将能源传输到接收节点。

利用“接收能源”选项，提高在多个站点之间分配和共享能源的效率，优化电力管理，实现互联节点的无缝运行。
DeepSeek参考:
接收能量：启用远程充能以从范围内另一节点接收能量。

通过点击「接收能量」按钮，你可以注册本节点，使其通过远程充能从最远 100 米范围内的另一节点接收能量。这让你能在位于不同空间站的节点之间建立能量传输连接。

确保位于另一空间站的来源节点已启用相应的「发送能量」功能，以启动远程充能过程。一旦连接建立且双方节点在范围内，能量将被传输以为接收节点供电。

利用「接收能量」选项，在多个空间站之间高效分配与共享能量资源，优化你的电力管理，实现互联节点的无缝运作。

英文原文:
Send Energy: Initiate remote charging to send energy to another node within range.

By clicking the Send Energy button, you can activate the remote charging function on this node, allowing it to transfer energy to another node located within a range of up to 100 meters. The receiving node must have the Receive Energy function enabled for the connection to be established.

Establishing a remote charging connection enables you to distribute energy resources from this node to power other nodes located in different stations. It facilitates efficient energy sharing and allows for a flexible and interconnected power network.

Ensure that the receiving node is within range and has the Receive Energy function enabled to successfully initiate the remote charging process.
原版中文（官方zh）:
输送能源：发起远程充能，向范围内的另一个节点输送能源。

点击“输送能源”按钮，就可以开启此节点的远程充能功能，向另一个节点输送能源，上述两个节点之间的距离上限为 100 米。负责接收能源的节点必须开启“接收能源”功能，才能成功建立连接。

你可以通过建立远程充能连接的方法，将该节点的能源分配给位于不同站点的其他节点。这种方法能够提高共享能源的效率，还可以建立结构灵活且相互连通的电力网络。

不要忘记在接收节点上开启相应的“接收能源”功能，而且要让两个节点的距离保持在距离限制之内，才能成功启动远程充能进程。
DeepSeek参考:
发送能量：发起远程充能以将能量发送至范围内另一节点。

通过点击「发送能量」按钮，你可以激活本节点的远程充能功能，使其能够将能量传输至最远 100 米范围内的另一节点。接收节点必须已启用「接收能量」功能，连接才能建立。

建立远程充能连接，让你能从此节点分配能量资源，为位于不同空间站的其他节点供电。这促进了高效的能量共享，并允许形成一个灵活互联的电力网络。

确保接收节点在范围内且已启用「接收能量」功能，以成功启动远程充能过程。

英文原文:
Toggle Operations: Enable or disable the operations of the selected structure.

By clicking this button, you can toggle the operations of the selected structure on or off. Enabling the operations will allow the structure to perform its designated tasks, whereas disabling them will temporarily halt its functionality.

Use the Toggle Operations option to control the output or behavior of the structure based on your current needs. This can be useful for conserving resources, optimizing production, or managing specific operational requirements.

Please note that disabling the operations of a structure may impact related processes or systems dependent on its functionality. Make sure to consider the implications before toggling the operations.
AI翻译:
切换操作：启用或禁用选定建筑的操作。

点击此按钮，你可以开启或关闭选定建筑的操作。启用操作将允许建筑执行其指定任务，而禁用则会暂时停止其功能。

使用切换操作选项根据当前需求控制建筑的输出或行为。这对于节约资源、优化生产或管理特定操作需求非常有用。

请注意，禁用建筑的操作可能会影响依赖其功能的相关流程或系统。切换操作前请务必考虑影响。
DeepSeek参考:
切换运转状态：启用或禁用所选设施的运转。

点击此按钮，你可以开启或关闭所选设施的运转。启用运转后，设施将执行其指定的任务；禁用则会暂时停止其功能。

使用「切换运转状态」选项，可根据你当前的需求控制设施的产出或行为。这对于节约资源、优化生产或管理特定的运转需求非常有用。

请注意，禁用设施的运转可能会影响依赖其功能的相关流程或系统。在切换运转状态前，请务必考虑其潜在影响。

英文原文:
Interplanetary Gates are your only real tether to the markets of Sol. 

Mark a T2 Metal, Parts or Water storage for sale, and sooner or later a trade hauler will crawl through that gate - cold hull, no crew, just code and cargo clamps. It’ll take your metal off-world and vanish back into the grid. 

When the shipment clears, credits get wired to your account - less fees, taxes, and whatever else the brokers skim.
AI翻译:
星际跃迁门是你与太阳系市场之间唯一真正的纽带。

将一个T2级金属、零件或水资源储仓标记为出售，迟早会有一艘贸易运输船穿过跃迁门而来——冷寂的船体，无人值守，只有程序与货物夹具。它会将你的金属运往外太空，随后消失在星际网络之中。

货物交割完成后，货款将汇入你的账户——扣除手续费、税款，以及经纪人从中抽走的那部分。
DeepSeek参考:
「星门是你与太阳系市场之间唯一的真实脐带。

将T2金属、零件或水存储仓标记为出售，迟早会有一艘贸易货船爬出那道星门——冰冷的船壳，没有船员，只有代码与货钳。它会载着你的金属离地，重新消失在物流网络深处。

货物一旦交割完毕，信用点便会汇入你的账户——当然得扣掉杂费、税款以及经纪人截流的种种抽成。」

英文原文:
Here you'll learn how to use blueprints to save and recall full station configurations. First we'll build up this solar wing to merge with the <BoldBlue>Deep Space Refine</> to provide it with additional power sources. The blueprints are already laid out.

You'll need a <BoldBlue>T2 Construction tower</> to relay enough energy to the construction sites and finish construction.
原版中文（官方zh）:
你可以在这里学习如何使用蓝图来保存和恢复完整的站点配置。首先，建造这个太阳能电池板，然后将电池板与<BoldBlue>深空精炼器</>合并，为精炼器提供额外的能量来源。蓝图已经准备好了。

英文原文:
Welcome, new miner, to Reclamation-9 Mining Co. – the finest, hardest, and most profitable mining outpost this side of the cosmos. You've chosen, or perhaps been chosen, to join the only industry left in the galaxy where a day's work is guaranteed to leave its mark on you. Out here, you won't find the corporate fluff of planetside offices or the cozy corridors of a flagship carrier. You're here because you've got grit, and because you understand that, while the frontier is dark and unforgiving, the riches within it are limitless. They're just waiting for someone brave (or foolish) enough to grab them.

Let's get a few things straight before we release you into the black: space mining isn't glamorous. It's backbreaking, metal-grinding labor that tests your lungs, mind, and guts. This sector is rich with precious ores and minerals, but also thick with risk. You'll be working near asteroid belts, fending off pirates, and dealing with equipment that's as likely to get you out of trouble as it is to kill you. Each mine is assigned a core rotation of assignments that include asteroid excavation, ore transport, and high-value mineral scans. Always remember to monitor your oxygen levels, and keep an eye on the hull integrity of your mining rig. One crack out there, and you're stardust.

The rewards are rich, and if you play your cards right, you may earn your way off this rock with a full cargo hold. But don't say we didn't warn you, rookie – out here, you're on your own.
AI翻译:
欢迎，新矿工，加入回收-9采矿公司——宇宙这一侧最好、最硬核、最赚钱的采矿前哨站。你选择了，或者说被选中了，加入银河中唯一一个能保证让你的每一天工作都在身上留下印记的行业。在这里，你找不到行星办公室里的企业浮夸作风，也没有旗舰航母的舒适走廊。你来这里是因为你有胆量，也因为你明白，尽管前线黑暗而无情，其中的财富却是无限的。它们只等着足够勇敢（或愚蠢）的人去夺取。

在我们把你送入黑暗之前，先说清楚几件事：太空采矿并不光鲜。这是艰苦的、磨损金属的劳动，考验着你的肺、思维和胆量。这片星区富含珍贵矿石和矿物，但也充满风险。你将在小行星带附近工作，抵御海盗，还要应对那些救你和害你概率相当的设备。每个矿点都分配了核心轮班任务，包括小行星开采、矿石运输和高价值矿物扫描。时刻监控你的氧气水平，留意采矿平台的船体完整性。出了一道裂缝，你就成星尘了。

回报丰厚，如果你打得一手好牌，可能带着满载货舱离开这块石头。但别说我们没警告过你，菜鸟——在这里，你只能靠自己。
DeepSeek参考:
欢迎你，新矿工，加入垦拓9号矿业公司——这是宇宙这一侧最出色、最坚固、利润最高的采矿前哨。你选择了，或许也是被选中，投身这个银河系里唯一一个能保证每天的辛勤工作都会在你身上留下印记的行业。在这里，你不会看到行星办公室里那种企业做派，也不会感受到旗舰航母上舒适的走廊。你来这里，是因为你有坚韧的毅力，也因为你明白，虽然这片边疆黑暗且无情，但其中蕴藏的财富是无限的。它们正等待着某个足够勇敢（或者说足够傻）的人去攫取。

在我们放你进入这无垠黑暗之前，有几件事得先说清楚：太空采矿并不光鲜。这是一项能累断腰、磨穿金属的苦活，考验着你的肺活量、心智和胆量。这个星区富含珍贵的矿石和矿产，但也危机四伏。你将在小行星带附近工作，击退海盗，摆弄那些既可能帮你脱困、也同样可能要你命的设备。每个矿场都被分配了一系列核心轮替任务，包括小行星挖掘、矿石运输和高价值矿物扫描。务必时刻留意你的氧气余量，并关注你采矿船的外壳完整性。在外太空，一旦船壳出现一道裂缝，你就会化为星尘。

这里的回报很丰厚，如果你处理得当，或许能带着满载的货舱，赢得离开这块破岩头的机会。但别说我们没警告过你，新手——在这里，一切都得靠你自己。

英文原文:
Welcome, new players, to the vast expanse of Starminer.

Starminer offers an immersive survival space station simulator with elements of tower defense. Your mission is to construct your rigs with a plethora of different modules and grow them into fully-fledged autonomous mining colonies. You must mine asteroids, manage colonists and crew, and defend against the ever-increasing cosmic threat.

As you embark on this journey, remember that space is full of dangers and obstacles that require resourcefulness, strategic thinking, and bravery. But I have faith you will rise to the challenge and prove yourselves worthy of exploring the final frontier.

Let the adventure begin, and may your efforts in deep space mining bring great prosperity to your colonies. The challenges you face may be daunting, but with determination and ingenuity, I am confident that you will overcome them and emerge victorious. So, let us forge ahead into the vast expanse of space, and may your success shine as brightly as the stars themselves.

欢迎新玩家来到星矿的浩瀚宇宙。

星矿是一款沉浸式的空间站生存模拟游戏，融合了塔防元素。你的任务是用各种不同的模块建造采矿平台，将它们发展成完善的自主采矿殖民地。你必须开采小行星，管理殖民者和船员，并抵御不断增强的宇宙威胁。

踏上这段旅程时，请记住太空充满危险和障碍，需要足智多谋、战略思维和勇气。但我相信你会迎接挑战，证明自己有资格探索这最后的边疆。

让冒险开始吧，愿你在深空采矿的努力为殖民地带来巨大的繁荣。你面临的挑战可能令人生畏，但凭借决心和智慧，我相信你能克服它们并取得胜利。那么，让我们勇往直前进入浩瀚太空，愿你的成功如星辰般璀璨。

英文原文:
As Earth’s orbital infrastructure expands, the Frontier Zone Gamma has been designated for the next stage of human development beyond the surface: the Frontier Habitat. This initiative aims to establish a network of interconnected space stations—capable of supporting life, industry, and long-term sustainability.

Your role is to lay the foundations and aid with the operations in this sector.

You are tasked with constructing the core elements of this system: a colony station for habitation, solar arrays for continuous power, refineries to process extracted resources, and a small-scale mining operation to supply them all. Each component must be carefully planned and strategically deployed.

Success here will define the model for orbital expansion across the planet—and beyond.

- Crafting Products

- Frigates

- Megastructures
- And much more...

We hope you enjoy this demo version of Starminer!

Deploy to the nearby asteroid field, locate viable extraction sites, and harvest enough ore to meet the quota. Prioritize efficiency: the faster you fill your bays, the sooner repair operations can resume.

英文原文:
Hey, the Leaky Ducks! You found them!

The last guy sent over to "help" was a complete moron. Crashed his ships during a water run and died on impact. Think you can bring me that ship, but put together?

Just dock or merge the Ducks and bring them over.

TIP: Dock Water Hauler 1 and Water Hauler 2 with the main Hauler ship.
You will have to possess all three ships before attempting to navigate or dock them.

「漏水鸭」找到了！干得不错！

把那几艘鸭子对接或合并起来，然后带回来就行。

提示：将「水运船1号」和「水运船2号」与主运输船对接。
在尝试操控或对接之前，你必须先接管全部三艘飞船。

只需将「小鸭」们对接或合并，然后带过来就行。

提示：将运水船1号和运水船2号与运水母舰对接。
你需要先控制全部三艘飞船，然后再尝试导航或对接它们。

英文原文:
This old rig has seen it's share of cadets throughout the time we've been stationed here.
As it happens with any old hunk of metal, things wear down, screws get loose, living quarters get depressurized. It's about time we do some maintenance repairs.

We need someone to deliver a shipment of silicon ore to the station. We will refine this ore to produce the necessary components to repair damaged and worn-out parts. You should find some chunks of silicon ore drifting around the area - you'd need a hangar with a hauler to pick them up. You might also try mining some nearby asteroids if you have a mining laser and enough storage space.
AI翻译:
自从我们驻扎在这里，这座老钻机就接待过无数学员。
任何老旧金属结构都难逃这个命运——零件磨损、螺丝松动、居住舱失压。是时候进行一次维护修缮了。

我们需要有人向空间站运送一批硅矿石。我们会将矿石精炼成必要的零部件，用于修复受损和老化的构件。你应该能在附近找到漂浮的硅矿石小行星块——需要一艘配备运输船的机库舰来拾取它们。如果你有采矿激光且储存空间足够，也可以尝试开采附近的小行星。
DeepSeek参考: 自从我们驻扎于此，这座老旧平台见证了无数批学员的来来往往。就像任何一堆老旧的金属块一样，部件会磨损，螺丝会松动，生活区会失压。是时候进行一些维护修理了。我们需要人运送一批硅矿到空间站。我们将精炼这些矿石，生产修复损坏和磨损部件所需的组件。你应在区域附近找到一些漂浮的硅矿石块——需要一个配备搬运船的机库来拾取它们。如果拥有采矿激光器和足够的存储空间，也可以尝试开采附近的小行星。

英文原文:
Welcome aboard, pilot.
You’ve selected your ship—an excellent choice, though it’s put you in the red. Standard procedure.

Your current debt has been logged, and repayment is expected. Until that balance is cleared, your hangarship's jump drive remains locked - no interplanetary travel permitted.

To repay what you owe, you’ll need to sell storage units through the interstellar gate. Right-click any storage and select Sell Storage to transfer its contents and credit the value toward your outstanding balance.

Asteroid fields in the region are open for mining. Strip what you can, bring it back, convert the haul into storage, and sell it through the gate to start chipping away at that debt. Clear your dues, and the stars open up to you.

Until then… you’re grounded.
AI翻译:
欢迎登舰，飞行员。
你已选定你的飞船——非常好的选择，不过这让你背上了债务。这是标准流程。

你当前的债务已记录在案，还款是必须的。在结清余额之前，你的机库舰跃迁驱动将保持锁定状态——禁止星际旅行。

要偿还债务，你需要通过星际跃迁门出售储存单元。右键点击任意储存单元，选择「出售储存」，即可转移其中的货物，并将价值计入你的未偿余额。

该区域的小行星带对采矿开放。尽量多采，带回来，转化为储存单元，再通过跃迁门出售，一点点偿清债务。还清欠款，星空才会向你敞开。

在那之前……你哪儿也去不了。
DeepSeek参考:
欢迎登舰，飞行员。
你选择了你的飞船——虽然是个不错的选择，但也让你背上了债务。这是标准流程。

你的当前债务已记录在案，请按时偿还。在债务清零之前，你机库飞船的跃迁引擎将保持锁定——禁止进行任何行星际航行。

为了偿还欠款，你需要通过星际之门出售储藏单元。右键点击任意储藏并选择「出售储藏」，即可转移其中的物资并将其价值用于抵扣你的未偿余额。

该区域的小行星带现已开放采矿。尽可能多地开采，带回来，将矿石转化为储藏单元，再通过星门售出，开始一点点地削减那笔债务。还清你的欠款，星海将为你敞开大门。

在此之前……你只能被束缚在地面。

英文原文: Now, it's time to transfer some much-needed resources from your ship to the Academy Vessel. Begin by selecting the Hangar module on your ship to initiate the trade with the Academy Vessel. Next, navigate to the Contacts panel located on the top left of the interface and click the TRADE button. Please make sure to have your Hangar selected, as the engineers will depart with cargo from the chosen Hangar. Keep in mind that the trade completion time depends on the distance the engineers need to travel to deliver the cargo to the other station. The closer your selected hangar is to the adjacent station's hangar, the faster the trade will be. When you click the TRADE button, the trade interface will open, allowing you to proceed with the resource transfer smoothly.
原版中文（官方zh）: 是时候把一些急需的资源从你的飞船转移至研究飞船上了。首先，选择你飞船上的机库模块，向研究飞船发起贸易请求。然后到界面左上方的“人脉”面板，点击“贸易”按钮。请确认你的机库模块已被选中，工程舰将装载着货物从所选机库启程。需注意，贸易完成时间取决于工程舰将货物运输至另一站点的飞行距离。两站机库的距离越短，贸易所需时间就越少。点击“贸易”按钮，打开贸易界面，顺利进行资源转移。
DeepSeek参考: 现在，是时候将一些急需的资源从你的飞船转移到学院飞船了。首先，选中你飞船上的「机库」模块，以开始与学院飞船进行贸易。接下来，导航到界面左上角的「联系人」面板，然后点击「贸易」按钮。请确保已选中你的机库，因为工程师们将带着货物从选定的机库出发。请注意，贸易完成时间取决于工程师运送货物到另一空间站所需的距离。你选定的机库离相邻空间站的机库越近，贸易就越快。当你点击「贸易」按钮时，贸易界面将会打开，让你能顺利进行资源转移。

英文原文: Welcome to the movement and trading tutorial! First things first – we have to see which direction our ship is facing! Press [G] to toggle the orientation tool, or press the corresponding systems button. This tool helps you make sense of your position in 3D space. Zoom out and find the blue arrows – the direction they are pointing is the ship's forward direction. The white arrows show the station's up vector. You can turn off the orientation tool by pressing [G] again.
AI翻译: 欢迎来到移动与交易教程！首先——我们要看清飞船的朝向！按下 [G] 切换方向工具，或点击对应的系统按钮。该工具可帮助你在三维空间中辨别自身位置。缩小视角，找到蓝色箭头——箭头所指的方向即为飞船的前进方向。白色箭头则显示空间站的垂直向量。再次按下 [G] 可关闭方向工具。
DeepSeek参考: 欢迎来到移动和贸易教程！首要任务——我们必须知道飞船正朝着哪个方向！按下[G]键来切换方向指示工具，或者点击对应的系统按钮。这个工具帮助你理解自己在三维空间中的位置。缩小画面并找到蓝色箭头——它们所指的方向就是飞船的前进方向。白色箭头则表示空间站的上方指向。你可以再次按下[G]键来关闭方向指示工具。

英文原文: Now press [W] to engage your thrusters. Because space is a vacuum, your ship will keep drifting endlessly until you apply a counterforce to stop your ship.  You can do so by pressing [R] to enable boosters or by toggling the appropriate button in the systems part of the interface (middle bottom). Now any time you release your throttle, the counter force will automatically be applied. Try and reach the first checkpoint, then press [R] to stop your ship.

DeepSeek参考: 现在按下[W]来启动你的推进器。由于太空是真空环境，你的飞船会无限漂移，直到你施加反向力来停船。你可以按[R]启用助推器，或在界面系统面板（中下方）中切换对应按钮来实现。现在每当你松开油门，反向力就会自动施加。试着抵达第一个检查点，然后按[R]停船。

英文原文:
6 Hmph! Already, your actions have created ripples throughout our little galaxy.
My superiors want you commissioned as an auxiliary officer, to carry out their agendas. They won't be pleased with me.
But I can hold out long enough - if you want access to Lalande, to the dangers and riches it holds, you must prove yourself.
Out in the far edges of our Solar System is the Kerrel Research Facility. A safe haven for scientists, independently funded and far-removed from our politics.
But isolated. Very isolated.
They missed their security check-in two days ago and I can't divert any patrols that far out. Only a catastrophic systems failure would disrupt their communications - or they're being jammed.
So I leave it to you, captain. Go to Kerrel and restore their communications. Prove to me your skill, and I will grant you access to Lalande.
AI翻译:
6 哼！你的所作所为已经在我们这片小小的星系中掀起了涟漪。
我的上级想让你以辅助军官的身份受命，为他们的计划效力。他们不会对我满意的。
但我还能撑一段时间——如果你想进入拉朗德，享有那里的危机与财富，你必须先证明自己的能力。
在我们太阳系的边缘地带，有一处Kerrel研究设施。那里是科学家们的避风港，独立运营，远离我们的政治纷争。
但那里很孤立。非常孤立。
两天前，他们错过了例行安全报到，而我又无法将任何巡逻队调派到那么远的地方。只有灾难性的系统故障才会中断他们的通讯——或者，他们正遭到干扰。
所以，舰长，这件事就交给你了。前往Kerrel，恢复他们的通讯。向我证明你的实力，我便会准许你进入拉朗德。
DeepSeek参考:
6 哼！你的行动已经在我们这个小星系里激起了涟漪。
我的上级想委任你为辅助军官，去执行他们的议程。他们不会对我满意的。
但我还能撑一段时间——如果你想去拉朗德星，去探寻那里的危险和财富，你必须先证明自己。
在我们太阳系的远端边缘，坐落着科尔研究设施。一个科学家的避风港，资金独立，远离我们的政治纷争。
但位置偏僻。非常偏僻。
他们两天前错过了安全签到，而我无法将巡逻队调遣到那么远的地方。能中断他们通讯的，要么是灾难性的系统故障，要么就是通讯被干扰了。
所以我把这事交给你了，舰长。去科尔星，恢复他们的通讯。向我证明你的能力，我就会准许你进入拉朗德星。

英文原文:
3. You are perhaps too young to remember, but humanity was very different before this gate.
We had just begun our exploration of the stars, had taken those first few steps. Every day, a new station was built, a new challenge overcome.
But the Jupiter Gate - well. At the time, it was a marvelous demonstration of cooperation and gave a budding UEA the credibility it needed.
But in hindsight, it was only ever a mistake. Strange as it is for me to say it.
AI翻译:
3. 你或许太年轻，不记得跃迁门出现之前的人类了。
那时我们刚刚开始探索星空，迈出最初的几步。每一天，都有新的空间站建成，新的挑战被克服。
木星跃迁门——唉，在当时，它是合作精神的绝妙体现，也为羽翼未丰的UEA赢得了所需的公信力。
但事后看来，它从一开始就是个错误。这话出自我口，连我自己都觉得奇怪。
DeepSeek参考:
3. 你可能太年轻，不记得了，但在这道星门出现之前，人类截然不同。
我们才刚刚开始探索群星，迈出了最初的那几步。每一天，都有新的空间站建成，都有新的挑战被克服。
但木星之门——唉。在当时，那是一次合作的绝佳展示，给了羽翼未丰的UEA所需的可信度。
但事后看来，它从一开始就是个错误。尽管这么说对我来说很奇怪。

英文原文:
9. Oh thank the Maker! When you jumped in, we feared the worst - that our time had run out. And then, with the battle, that some poor innocent had died for our mistakes.
But you were victorious! And with a such a warship… Perun-class, that is a name I have not heard in many years.
Perhaps you can be convinced to aid us, captain. Although, to come all this way prepared for battle - you have already been convinced?
AI翻译:
9. 感谢造物主！你跃迁进来时，我们以为最坏的情况发生了——以为我们的时间已经耗尽。然后看到那场战斗，又担心某个无辜者因我们的错误而丧命。
但你赢了！驾驶着这样一艘战舰……Perun级，这个名字我已多年未曾听闻。
或许能说服你帮助我们，舰长。不过，你做好战斗准备一路赶来——你其实早已决定了，对吗？
DeepSeek参考:
9. 哦，感谢造物主！当你跳入星系时，我们担心极了——以为我们大限已至。然后，看到战斗，又担心某个可怜的无辜者为我们的错误而丧命。
但你们赢了！还开着这样一艘战舰……佩伦级，这个名字我已经很多年没听过了。
也许可以说服你来帮助我们，舰长。不过，你一路远道而来，还做好了战斗准备——难道你已经被说服了？

英文原文:
10. Of course he did. He's a good man, bound by the responsibilities of his station. The pametnic thinks to change the system from within.
He sent you to investigate our silence in his stead? His pockets are not so deep - I wonder what he hold over you. Bah, it is not my concern!
Let me tell you of our troubles, captain.
Pirates! A mighty armada of their war-rigs and scrap-ships appeared seven days ago, making demands of us. Surrender our research in return for our lives, or some such nonsense.
We refused of course. We came here to be free of such brutality! But we have no weapons, and they dare not board, for fear of the data's destruction.
So they left behind that oversized jammer and retreated to their base, from which they issue threats every few hours. A perfect stalemate until you showed up!
AI翻译:
10. 当然，他就是这样的人。他是个好人，却被自己身份的责任所束缚。那个帕梅特尼克（pametnic）想着从内部改变体制。
他派你来替他调查我们音讯全无的原因？他的财力没那么雄厚——我倒想知道他拿什么来驱使你。算了，那不是我该操心的事！
让我来告诉你我们的遭遇吧，舰长。
海盗！七天前，一支庞大的舰队——满是他们的战争钻机和废铁拼凑的破船——突然出现，向我们提出要求：交出我们的研究成果换取性命，诸如此类的无稽之谈。
我们当然拒绝了。我们来到这里就是为了摆脱这种暴力！但我们手无寸铁，而他们也不敢强行登船，生怕数据就此被销毁。
于是他们留下了那台巨型干扰器，退回了他们的基地，每隔几个小时就发来威胁。这场完美的僵局，一直持续到你的出现！
DeepSeek参考:
10. 他当然这么做了。他是个好人，却被职责所束缚。那个pametnic想从体制内改变系统。
他派你来替他调查我们的沉默？他的钱袋可没那么深——我很好奇他拿什么牵制了你。呸，这不是我该操心的！
让我来告诉你我们的麻烦吧，舰长。
海盗！七天前，一支由武装堡垒和废铁船组成的强大海盗舰队出现了，向我们提出了要求。用我们的研究来换取活命机会，之类的鬼话。
我们当然拒绝了。我们到这里是为了摆脱这种暴行！但我们没有武器，他们也不敢登船，怕我们销毁数据。
所以他们留下了那个超大的干扰器，撤回了他们的基地，每隔几小时就从那里发出威胁。一场完美的僵局，直到你出现！

I have personally witnessed the consequences.
And now, ten years later, the corporations regain their strength. Svinuks that they are, they would control Lalande and all systems beyond. But the game has changed - it's a shadow war now, fought through proxies and deniable assets.

我们还没准备好。许多人所称的「企业战争」，在这座跃迁门建成的那一刻便已注定——如同一场灌木丛火，席卷一切、燃尽自身，留下的只有满目疮痍。
那些后果，我亲眼目睹。
而如今，十年过去，那些企业重新积蓄力量。他们如同Svinuks一般，妄图掌控拉朗德及其以远的所有星系。但规则已经改变——这是一场暗战，通过代理人和可推诿的棋子来角力。
还有些传言……算了，你不必在意那些。

英文原文: The backbone of any resource-driven economy. Miners specialize in harvesting raw materials from asteroids. Equipped with the best mining lasers and tools, it maximizes extraction efficiency and minimizes waste. With perks like increased mining laser damage, faster extraction rates, and quicker refinery processes, this class excels at turning space rocks into profitable resources. Miners are critical to ensuring a steady flow of resources to fuel the station's industry and growth.
AI翻译: 一切资源驱动型经济的中流砥柱。矿工专精于从小行星中开采原材料。配备最优质的采矿激光与工具，以最大化开采效率、最小化资源浪费。凭借采矿激光伤害加成、更快的开采速率以及更高效的精炼流程等专长，该职业擅长将太空岩石转化为丰厚资源。矿工对于维持稳定的资源流动、为空间站的工业发展提供动力至关重要。
DeepSeek参考: 一切资源驱动经济的基石。矿工专精于从小行星开采原材料。他们配备最顶尖的采矿激光与工具，最大化提取效率并减少浪费。凭借采矿激光伤害加成、更快提取速率和加速精炼过程等专长，该职业擅长将太空岩石转化为利润丰厚的资源。矿工对确保持续的资源流以推动空间站的工业与增长至关重要。

英文原文: Navigators are the experts in spatial travel and logistics. They optimize travel routes, avoiding dangerous sectors and ensuring the fleet moves quickly and efficiently across the galaxy. Their deep understanding of starmaps and navigation systems allows them to chart courses that minimize fuel consumption and evade hostile encounters. Navigators are invaluable for long-distance expeditions or escaping dangerous situations.
AI翻译: 领航员是空间旅行与物流调度方面的专家。他们优化航行路线，规避危险区域，确保舰队在星系间快速高效地穿梭。对星图与导航系统的深入理解让他们能够规划出消耗燃料最少、规避敌对遭遇的航线。领航员在远距离远征或脱离险境时不可或缺。

英文原文: The Scientist class is focused on research and innovation. Commanders who choose this path are better at unlocking new technologies, upgrading ships, and improving station capabilities. Their knowledge helps the Commander stay ahead of the competition through superior technology.

DeepSeek参考: 科学家职业专注于研究创新。选择此路径的指挥官更擅长解锁新技术、升级舰船和增强空间站能力。科学家们竭力拓展极限——研发更快的舰船，设计更高效的采矿设备，乃至发现蕴藏未开发资源的全新小行星带。他们的知识助力指挥官凭借技术优势领先竞争对手。

Their expertise lies in leveraging supply and demand to turn a profit.

Unidentified vessel, this is Hydra Depot Control. You're drifting into neutral territory. We don’t care who you’re running from, just don’t bring the trouble here. If you’re looking to trade, our docks are open. If you’re here for contracts, keep your comms open - we might have something.

We maintain a balance out here. Don’t tip the scales.
